decisions.briefing: Risk-on session with NASDAQ +1.4% and S&P 500 +0.7% — tech momentum is healthy. Portfolio is well-positioned: NVDA and NSIT both appear on the screener at score 90, confirming our thesis on those holds. Cash is only $170.95, well below the $500 threshold needed to open new positions, so no buys are possible today. Holding all 6 positions and letting the momentum work.

market_education.summary_en: Markets rallied Friday in a clear risk-on session, with the tech-heavy NASDAQ outperforming the broader S&P 500 by a wide margin (+1.4% vs +0.7%). Semiconductor and AI-adjacent names led gains as investors rotated back into growth after weeks of tariff-driven caution. The divergence between NASDAQ and S&P 500 signals that capital is concentrating into high-beta tech rather than spreading broadly, a classic late-week momentum chase.
market_education.summary_zh: 週五美股明顯呈現風險偏好情緒，以科技股為主的納斯達克指數大幅跑贏標普500，分別上漲1.4%與0.7%。半導體及人工智能相關類股領漲，反映投資者在數週關稅不確定因素消退後重回成長股懷抱。納斯達克與標普500的表現分歧，顯示資金正集中流入高貝他值科技股，而非廣泛分布，是典型的週末動能追漲格局。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-on' market is when investors feel confident and shift money into higher-risk, higher-reward assets like growth stocks and tech. You can spot it when NASDAQ outperforms the S&P 500, and volatile momentum names lead the rally. Today's session is a textbook example — NASDAQ +1.4% vs S&P +0.7%, with our high-momentum screener stocks (NVDA, NSIT) holding firm.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險偏好（Risk-On）」市場是指投資者信心提升，願意將資金轉移至高風險高回報資產，例如成長股與科技股。判斷方式包括：納斯達克跑贏標普500、動能強勁的個股領漲。今日盤勢正是教科書式的風險偏好格局——納指上漲1.4%，標普僅0.7%，而我們持有的高動能個股（NVDA、NSIT）也穩健守住漲幅。
